svg.text: Conceptual model — Persepolis (CIDOC-CRM / FOAF instance graph)
Yellow = class (owl:Class) · pink circle = individual (instance) · labeled arrow = object property
owl:Class (crm: CIDOC-CRM, foaf:, skos:) — reused vocabulary terms
Individual (one of the 20 project entities or 4 events) — instance of the class above it
Dashed = secondary relationship (between two other entities)
Dotted = event-linking property (crm:P11, P92i, P93i, P7)
30 relations total — 18 direct, 12 secondary (matches theoretical_model.svg exactly)
